title: oldenlandia maingayi
intro: Oldenlandia maingayi, also known as Maingay's grass or Oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia maingayi include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health ailments.
